sections.paragraph:
ὡσαννά=Aram. הוֹשַׁע נָא=Hebr. הוֹשִׁיעָה נָּא (Hebr. Ps 118:25); on the spelling s. W-H., Introd. §408; Tdf., Prol. 107; indecl. a shout of praise, hosanna (lit.=‘help’ or ‘save, I pray’, an appeal that became a liturgical formula; as a part of the Hallel [Ps 113–18 Hebr.] it was familiar to everyone in Israel. In the course of time an acclamation, abs. Mk 11:9 (RGundry, Mark ’93, 630); J 12:13. W. additions: τῷ υἱῷ Δαυίδ Mt 21:9a, 15 (FCoggan, ET 52, ’40/41, 76f; CWood, ibid. 357). τῷ θεῷ Δ. D 10:6. ἐν τοῖς ὑψίστοις Mt 21:9b; Mk 11:10 (s. ὕψιστος 1).—W-S. p. xv; EKautzsch, Gramm. d. Bibl.-Aram. 1884, 173; Dalman, Gramm.2 1905, 249; Billerb. I 1922, 845ff; Zahn, Einl. I3 14; EbNestle, Philol. 68, 1909, 462; FSpitta, ZWT 52, 1910, 307–20; FBurkitt, JTS 17, 1916, 139–49; Elbogen2 138f; 219f; HBornhäuser, Sukka ’35, 106f; EBishop, ET 53, ’42, 212–14; Goodsp., Probs. 34f; EWerner, JBL 65, ’46, 97–122; JKennard, Jr., JBL 67, ’48, 171–76; ELohse, NovT 6, ’63, 183–89.—M-M. EDNT. TW.

W-H. W-H. = BWestcott/FHort—List 1, beg.

Tdf. Tdf. = CvTischendorf—List 1, beg.

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

abs. abs. = absolute

ET ET = Expository Times—List 6

ibid. ibid. = ibidem (in the same book or passage)

Δ̠D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

W-S. W-S. = GWiner, Grammatik des neutestamentlichen Sprachidioms, ed. PSchmiedel—List 6

Dalman Dalman = GD., various works—List 6

Billerb. Billerb. = HLStrack and PBillerbeck, Kommentar z. NT aus Talmud u. Midrasch—List 6

Zahn Zahn = TZ., various works—List 6

Philol Philol , Zeitschrift für das klassische Altertum—List 6

ZWT ZWT = Zeitschrift für Wissenschaftliche Theologie—List 6

JTS JTS = Journal of Theological Studies—List 6

Elbogen Elbogen = IE., Der jüd. Gottesdienst—List 6

Goodsp., Goodsp., Probs. = Problems of NT Translation—List 6

JBL JBL = Journal of Biblical Literature—List 6

NovT NovT = Novum Testamentum (periodical)—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

EDNT EDNT = Exegetical Dictionary of the NT—List 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1106
